title: Detective Conan - Episode 1194 - Kid VS Hakuba: The Azure Throne (Part Two)
content: Hakuba, the disguised Kid, and Conan expose the murderer. But Hakuba harbors yet another suspicion…

title: Crunchyroll Presents: The Anime Effect Season 2 - Episode 52 - A Live-Action Samurai Champloo?! + NEW Sekiro Anime Trailer Reactions
content: This week we’re getting our shovels out to dig news this week, like a live-action Samurai Champloo in the works, some of our fave anime artists planning festival appearances and MORE! Plus, we share what anime we're watching RIGHT NOW and we hear from y'all in Fan Service.

title: Hackadoll the Animation - Episode 13 - HackaDolls Can Handle Anything, Even Comiket
content: The Hackadolls return to Ayame (their subject from episode 1) to see how she's enjoying life as a born-again otaku. But Ayame's friend's upcoming marriage is making her rethink over her life's choices...
author: Crunchyroll

title: Hackadoll the Animation - Episode 12 - Magical Girl Lovely Hurt♥
content: It's a pleasant Sunday morning. The Hackadolls are summoned to help out the ever iconic "magical girls" kids love so much, but the magical girls and monsters in this town are not what you'd expect. The Hackadolls face what might be their hardest challenge yet.
author: Crunchyroll

title: Hackadoll the Animation - Episode 11 - VA Police, Move Out!
content: The Hackadolls research the perfect present for a fan to give his favorite VA at her birthday event. When the special day arrives, the Hackadoll's client decides to personally deliver the painstakingly acquired present...
author: Crunchyroll
